methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $27M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Supersonic & Hypersonic (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 2 same-sector peers exist in Supersonic & Hypersonic, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Astro Mechanica is a Series A-stage company in the Supersonic & Hypersonic sector, having raised $27M+ to date. The comparable universe consists of two public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and two private peers (Boom Supersonic, Hermeus), though the narrow peer set presents meaningful constraints on valuation precision.

Given the limited comparable data at the same stage and valuation tier, only the Stage-Progression method is reliably applicable. This approach uses the $27M total raised as a proxy baseline and applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A to subsequent-stage advancement, yielding an implied valuation of $54M. The Peer-Median method could not be applied due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables meeting minimum sample thresholds (fewer than three datapoints).

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $46M to $62M, with a median implied value of $54M. The relatively narrow band reflects reliance on a single methodology rather than methodological consensus. Key uncertainties include the scarcity of comparable transactions in Supersonic & Hypersonic at this stage, the applicability of standard stage-progression multiples to frontier aerospace, and undisclosed terms among the named peers. Additional commercial or funding milestones from comparable companies would materially strengthen confidence in this range.
